• Exciting new improvements and surprises

Ready to play? Let’s go! Don't forget to leave us a review—we love hearing from you!

title: Lords Mobile: Kingdom Wars
notes:
Football fever has gripped not just the world, but the Kingdoms of Athena as well!
Take part in the Lords Ball Carnival to get an event Castle Skin, Army Skin, Route Skin, Turf Decorations, Emotes, and many more!

．Guild Fest: Added special quest requirement note to Gear Crafting quests: "Must unlock the Lunar Foundry to complete quest"

．Revamped the Shelter's interface (Only affects Quick Battle)

title: Skyblade: Idle Immortal-APAC
notes:
1. From June 18 to July 8, the Taorium Festival series of events will be open. Details are as follows:
Legacy Codex: Get rich rewards like Immortal Jades and Starcharts from the Legacy Codex. Unlocking advanced rewards also grants Voucher rebates and specific Earth Tier Citta Choice Boxes.
Prediction Conclave: During the Taorium Festival, participate in predictions of certain gameplays to enjoy a 50% increase in rewards upon success. Discounted items will also be added to the Celestial Conclave

title: Pikmin Bloom
notes:
Thanks for playing Pikmin Bloom! New in this version:

- Adjusted the sorting order of mushrooms in the Expeditions Tab. Mushroom battles you've been invited to will continue to be prioritized. If you still have free mushroom battle tries remaining for the day, mushrooms with four or fewer participants will now be shown next.
- Minor improvements and bug fixes.

*Please download the latest version of the app from the store for the changes above to be reflected.

title: AFK Journey
notes:
Major Updates
The Crown of Ashes season will officially launch after the update for servers that have been active for at least 21 days. To unlock the season, you must reach Level 240 with your Hands of Resonance and complete New Journey. Once these conditions are met, simply complete the tutorial quests to begin the new season's storyline: King's Sword.
